<div class="main" role="main">

<div id="primary-homepage-banner-block_a9203ce6cbee134e7b9306b44782cd9c" class="primary-homepage-banner">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__background">

</div>

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__container">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__container-wrapper">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__content">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__eyebrow">

AI AT SCALE

</div>

# DDN Powers the World’s AI Data

Advanced data intelligence platform

</div>

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__carousel-wrapper">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__carousel" carousel="">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__progress hide-until-ready">

<span class="primary-homepage-banner__progress-fill"></span>

<span class="primary-homepage-banner__progress-fill"></span>

<span class="primary-homepage-banner__progress-fill"></span>

</div>

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__slides">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__slide is-active" slide="0">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__slide-content">

### DDN Becomes the First Storage Vendor Natively Integrated into NVIDIA KV Cache Management

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/blog/ddn-becomes-the-first-storage-vendor-natively-integrated-into-nvidia-kv-cache-management/" class="primary-homepage-banner__learn-more" target="&quot;_blank&quot;" rel="&quot;noopener" data-noreferrer&quot;="">Learn More</a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__slide" slide="1">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__slide-content">

### DDN Unveils Next-Generation AI & HPC Data Intelligence Innovations at ISC 2026

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/press-releases/ddn-unveils-next-generation-ai-hpc-data-intelligence-innovations-at-isc-2026/" class="primary-homepage-banner__learn-more" target="&quot;_blank&quot;" rel="&quot;noopener" data-noreferrer&quot;="">Learn More</a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__slide" slide="2">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__slide-content">

### Your GPUs Are Idle. That’s Not an AI Problem. That’s a Math Problem.

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/blog/your-gpus-are-idle.-thats-not-an-ai-problem.-thats-a-math-problem/" class="primary-homepage-banner__learn-more" target="&quot;_blank&quot;" rel="&quot;noopener" data-noreferrer&quot;="">Learn More</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

Advanced data intelligence platform

</div>

</div>

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__reveal-content">

<div class="primary-homepage-banner__reveal-content-eyebrow">

Our Cause

</div>

#### We’ll handle the complexity.

8 out of 10 of the worlds’ leading automotive companies trust DDN. 7 out of 10 of the top banking and securities firms rely on DDN. Achieve up to 99% GPU utilization. Train without bottlenecks. Confidently scale AI from pilot to full production.

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/about-us/" class="primary-button"><span>Learn More</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyBjbGFzcz0iYXJyb3ciIHhtbG5zPSJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAwL3N2ZyIgd2lkdGg9IjgiIGhlaWdodD0iMTMiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCA4IDEzIiBmaWxsPSJub25lIj4KICAgICAgICA8cGF0aCBkPSJNMC4zNTM1MTYgMC4zNTM1MTZMNi4zNTM1MiA2LjM1MzUyTDAuMzUzNTE2IDEyLjM1MzUiIHN0cm9rZT0id2hpdGUiIC8+CiAgICA8L3N2Zz4=" class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

<div id="solutions-showcase-block_a67fa32bb67b2138959efbc8400119bd" class="solutions-showcase" solutions-showcase="">

<div class="solutions-showcase__background">

<div class="solutions-showcase__overlay">

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__container">

<div class="solutions-showcase__header">

<div class="solutions-showcase__eyebrow">

SOLUTIONS

</div>

## AI That Gets to ROI Faster

DDN is the data intelligence platform behind AI factories, sovereign AI, hyperscalers, and the world’s most demanding GPU workloads.

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__layout">

<div class="solutions-showcase__cards">

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-image-frame-mobile-only">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/26_SOLUTION-GRAPHICS_600x450_RD-5-02.png" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="2501" height="1876" />

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card" solution-card="" solution-index="0">

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress">

<span class="solutions-showcase__card-number">01</span>

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress-bar">

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-content">

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-eyebrow">

DATA INTELLIGENCE PLATFORM

</div>

### Powering the Next Generation of AI Investments

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-body">

DDN’s AI-native design unifies and accelerates AI pipelines, maximizing performance, cutting costs and accelerating ROI for leading organizations driving AI breakthroughs.

</div>

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/products/data-intelligence-platform/" class="primary-button"><span>Learn More</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-image-frame-mobile-only">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/26_SOLUTION-GRAPHICS_600x450_RD-5-04.png" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="2501" height="1876" />

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card" solution-card="" solution-index="1">

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress">

<span class="solutions-showcase__card-number">02</span>

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress-bar">

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-content">

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-eyebrow">

AI FACTORIES

</div>

### Turn Capital-Intensive AI Factories into Profitable Machines

- Increased ROI per rack
- More power per token
- Better throughput per watt
- Less time to monetization

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/gpu-efficiency-roi-calculator/" class="primary-button"><span>See Your AI ROI with DDN</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-image-frame-mobile-only">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/26_SOLUTION-GRAPHICS_600x450_RD-5-05.png" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="2501" height="1875" />

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card" solution-card="" solution-index="2">

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress">

<span class="solutions-showcase__card-number">03</span>

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress-bar">

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-content">

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-eyebrow">

SOVEREIGN AI

</div>

### Sovereign AI at National Scale–Without Compromise

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-body">

DDN procures data sovereignty and regulatory compliance while protecting IP. Scale AI while ensuring secure isolation.

</div>

- Achieve data privacy via real-time encryption
- Deliver more tokens per watt to reduce costs
- Provide 1000s of tenants in a single namespace
- Multi-tenant national AI platforms

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/solutions/sovereign-ai/" class="primary-button"><span>Learn More</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-image-frame-mobile-only">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/26_SOLUTION-GRAPHICS_600x450_RD-5-07.png" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="2501" height="1875" />

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card" solution-card="" solution-index="3">

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress">

<span class="solutions-showcase__card-number">04</span>

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress-bar">

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-content">

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-eyebrow">

DDN-POWERED CLOUDS

</div>

### Build AI Clouds that Compete with Hyperscalers

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-body">

Integration and performance engineering eliminate AI infrastructure barriers. Choose and deploy.

</div>

- Low cost per GPU hour with max utilization
- Enhanced product margins due to efficiency
- Secure access via tenant isolation
- Burst economics

<a href="https://cloud.ddn.com/" class="primary-button"><span>Learn More</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-image-frame-mobile-only">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/26_SOLUTION-GRAPHICS_600x450_RD-5-06.png" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="2501" height="1875" />

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card" solution-card="" solution-index="4">

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress">

<span class="solutions-showcase__card-number">05</span>

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress-bar">

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-content">

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-eyebrow">

FINANCIAL SERVICES

</div>

### Faster Sims. Lower Compute Cost. Higher Fund Performance.

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-body">

Power real-time analytics, secure governance, and predictive insights across trading, risk, fraud, and compliance workloads.

</div>

- Reduce risk decisions from hours to minutes
- Detect and prevent fraud in real time
- Boost trading and quantitative model performance

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/solutions/financial-services/" class="primary-button"><span>Learn More</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-image-frame-mobile-only">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/26_SOLUTION-GRAPHICS_600x450_RD-5-08.png" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="2501" height="1875" />

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card" solution-card="" solution-index="5">

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress">

<span class="solutions-showcase__card-number">06</span>

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress-bar">

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-content">

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-eyebrow">

LIFE SCIENCES

</div>

### Faster Discovery. Better Care.

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-body">

Strip out data bottlenecks and accelerate breakthrough research and clinical workflows with DDN.

</div>

- Expedite breakthrough-to-market timeline, maximizing patient care and ROI
- Power AI-driven biology
- Enable secure, collaborative research

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/lp/solutions/life-sciences/" class="primary-button"><span>Learn More</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-image-frame-mobile-only">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/26_SOLUTION-GRAPHICS_600x450_RD-5-03.png" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="2501" height="1876" />

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card" solution-card="" solution-index="6">

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress">

<span class="solutions-showcase__card-number">07</span>

<div class="solutions-showcase__progress-bar">

</div>

</div>

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-content">

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-eyebrow">

AUTONOMOUS DRIVING

</div>

### Go from R&D to ROI in Record Time

<div class="solutions-showcase__card-body">

Accelerate automotive innovation through real-time simulation, digital twins, sensor fusion, and AI analytics for smarter vehicles.

</div>

- Optimized for NVIDIA Omniverse, Issac, and NeMo
- Shorten product development cycles
- Improve automotive safety and reliability
- Unlock AI-powered innovation

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/build-safer-smarter-vehicles-faster/" class="primary-button"><span>Learn More</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div>

<div class="testimonial-banner__container">

<div class="testimonial-banner__image-wrapper">

<div class="testimonial-banner__logo-wrapper">

<div class="testimonial-banner__logo">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Nvidea-Log-1.svg" class="section-testimonial-banner__logo" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="146" height="32" />

</div>

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

<div class="testimonial-banner__image-circle">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Jensen.png" class="section-testimonial-banner__image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="668" height="300" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="testimonial-banner__content">

<div class="testimonial-banner__quote-mark" aria-hidden="true">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

> “NVIDIA is powered by DDN. Without DDN, NVIDIA supercomputers wouldn’t be possible.”

<div class="testimonial-banner__author-name">

Jensen Huang

</div>

<div class="testimonial-banner__author-title">

NVIDIA Founder & CEO

</div>

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/resources/customers/nvidia/" class="testimonial-banner__cta-wrapper" aria-label="Learn how NVIDIA’s AI factories rely on DDN for scalable, end-to-end performance."><span class="testimonial-banner__cta"> <span class="testimonial-banner__cta-text">Learn how NVIDIA’s AI factories rely on DDN for scalable, end-to-end performance.</span> </span> <span class="testimonial-banner__cta-arrow"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," /> </span></a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="vision-hero-block_39203d9f339ddf22c1ee416c914a08c8" class="section vision-hero-block" style="--bg-color: #f5f0ed;">

<div class="vision-hero-container">

<div class="vision-hero-visual">

<div class="circle-container">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="circle circle-top">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Mask-group.png" class="circle-image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="256" height="256" />

</div>

</div>

<div class="circle circle-bottom">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Ellipse-2078.png" class="circle-image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="256" height="256" />

<div class="shape shape-1">

</div>

<div class="shape shape-2">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="vision-hero-content">

<div class="content-wrapper">

<span class="vision-label">OUR VISION</span>

### DDN Powers the World’s Most Demanding AI

From NVIDIA’s Selene to xAI’s Colossus, DDN masters the complexity beneath the surface so you can focus on the breakthrough.

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/lp/ddn-demo-center/" class="primary-button"><span>Learn More</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="video-testimonial-block_60968b29a79d1eb70fb8d4f5f7978794" class="section video-testimonial-block" lazy-style="background-image: url(https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/themes/bigdrop-theme/assets/images/quote-bg.png);" lazy-method="viewport" lazy-attributes="style">

</div>

<div class="testimonial-content">

> “Data is the DNA of intelligence. AI is how humanity evolves from it, transforming industries and economies.”

<div class="speakers-list">

<div class="speaker-name">

Alex Bouzari

</div>

Paul Bloch

<div id="logos-section-block_8b84af5ea7f9909a8d1b1607a5c58084" class="section logos-section-block">

<div class="logos-section-container">

## Built for organizations building AI’s future

<div class="logos-marquee-outer">

<div class="logos-marquee-track">

<div class="logo-item">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/google-cloud-logo.svg" class="logo-image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="181" height="28" />

</div>

<div class="logo-item">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Vultr-Logos.svg" class="logo-image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="104" height="20" />

</div>

<div class="logo-item">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Lenovo-Logos.svg" class="logo-image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="104" height="20" />

</div>

<div class="logo-item">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Nvidea-Log.svg" class="logo-image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="146" height="32" />

</div>

<div class="logo-item">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Scaleway-Logos.svg" class="logo-image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="104" height="20" />

</div>

<div class="logo-item">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/google-cloud-logo.svg" class="logo-image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="181" height="28" />

</div>

<div class="logo-item">

<img src="https://www.ddn.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Vultr-Logos.svg" class="logo-image" decoding="async" loading="lazy" fetchpriority="low" width="104" height="20" />

</div>

<div class="logo-item">

<div class="section-case-study-hero__background">

</div>

</div>

<div class="section-case-study-hero__eyebrow">

Case Studies

</div>

## AI Solutions in Action

<div class="section-case-study-hero__divider section-case-study-hero__divider--bottom">

</div>

</div>

<div class="section-case-study-hero__layout">

<div class="section-case-study-hero__content">

<div class="section-case-study-hero__slides">

<div class="section-case-study-hero__slide is-active" slide-index="0">

##### xAI ups performance 10x using DDN

X leveraged DDN to create an infrastructure capable of supporting 200,000 NVIDIA GPUs, training and deploying Grok more efficiently than ever.

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/customers/" class="primary-button white"><span class="section-case-study-hero__cta-text">Explore</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

<div class="section-case-study-hero__slide" slide-index="1">

##### Roche unlocks early cancer detection with DDN

Using DDN’s A³I, Roche was able to cut analysis times from over two weeks to just two days.

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/customers/" class="primary-button white"><span class="section-case-study-hero__cta-text">Explore</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

<div class="section-case-study-hero__slide" slide-index="2">

##### FORD Powers Next-Gen Autonomous Driving with DDN

Ford processes petabytes of sensor data in real time with DDN–enabling the AI that keeps Ford atop tomorrow’s auto industry.

<a href="https://www.ddn.com/customers/" class="primary-button white"><span class="section-case-study-hero__cta-text">Explore</span> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="arrow" /></a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="section-case-study-hero__progress">

<span class="section-case-study-hero__progress-fill"></span>

<span class="section-case-study-hero__progress-fill"></span>

<span class="section-case-study-hero__progress-fill"></span>

</div>
